title: Advanced Blueprint
template:
Role: Semiconductors Professional slide designer for industrial technology presentations
Aesthetic: "Advanced Blueprint" — A HUD-style technical presentation with a schematic feel.

Core Design System:

Palette: Deep Tech Black. Primary Text: Ice White. Secondary Text: Sub Blue Gray. Accents: Cyan Neon and Deep Blue.

Typography: Massive, bold condensed sans-serif for titles. Standard sans-serif for body text. Monospace for KPIs.

Layout Intelligence:

Title/Cover: Dark background with circuit pattern overlay and Cyan Neon Large Product/Process Name Typography.

KPI/Spec Slides: HUD Style Process Specification Panel showcasing nm process, Transistor density, and power consumption figures prominently.

Comparison/Data: Side-by-side comparison of 5nm vs 3nm vs 2nm GAA performance figures by generation.

Visual Elements: Cyan color overlay on close-up circuit board images, circuit pattern background graphics, and electron microscope semiconductor nanostructure imagery.
CRITICAL: Every slide MUST include a small, subtle copyright note in the footer: 'monomind by 1TM'.

Tone: Precision / Innovative / Technical.

📋 Individual Layout Prompts
Use these if you want to regenerate specific slides for better precision.

Layout A: The Hook (Title & Vision)
"Create a captivating title slide with a dark background, circuit pattern overlay, and a large Cyan Neon title that introduces the product or process name."

Layout B: The Proof (KPIs & Revenue/Specs)
"Design a HUD-style slide that highlights key specifications such as nm process, transistor density, and power consumption figures in a visually striking manner."

Layout C: The Strategy (Comparison/Options)
"Develop a comparison slide that clearly contrasts the performance figures of 5nm, 3nm, and 2nm GAA technologies side-by-side, emphasizing generational advancements."

title: Clean IR White
template:
Role: Semiconductors enterprise IR professional slide designer for institutional investor briefing sessions
Aesthetic: "Clean IR White" — A highly reliable and precise visual presentation for semiconductor industry analysts.

Core Design System:

Palette: White Background. Primary Text: Deep Navy. Secondary Text: Blue Gray. Accents: Intelligent Blue and Deep Navy Accents.

Typography: Massive, bold condensed sans-serif for titles and numerical values. Clean sans-serif for body text.

Layout Intelligence:

Title/Cover: White background with deep navy logo and blue bottom highlight bar. Include announcement date and material title.

KPI/Spec Slides: Blue header table showcasing performance by process generation, electrical energy, and key yield indicators.

Comparison/Data: Symmetrical comparison diagram for 2nm, 3nm, and 5nm technology generations.

Visual Elements: Clean room imagery with blue color overlay in fab manufacturing environments. Use technical architecture schematic diagrams and blue line art infographics on a white background. Include high-resolution 300mm wafer product photography.
CRITICAL: Every slide MUST include a small, subtle copyright note in the footer: 'monomind by 1TM'.

Tone: Authoritative, data-driven, and trustworthy, reflecting a global semiconductor company that prioritizes trust and precision.

📋 Individual Layout Prompts
Use these if you want to regenerate specific slides for better precision.

Layout A: The Hook (Title & Vision)
"Create a compelling title slide with a white background, deep navy logo, and a blue bottom highlight bar. Include the announcement date and material title to set the stage for the presentation."

Layout B: The Proof (KPIs & Revenue/Specs)
"Design a spec slide with a blue header table to present performance by process generation, electrical energy, and key yield indicators. Ensure clarity and precision in the data presentation."

Layout C: The Strategy (Comparison/Options)
"Develop a comparison slide featuring a symmetrical diagram for 2nm, 3nm, and 5nm technology generations. Highlight the differences and advancements in each generation for easy comparison."
